# Rests and Downtime

## Query Use

Use this when the table needs rest guidance.

## Shared Rules

Each rest grants two downtime moves.

## Short Rest

Short rests refresh limited resources.

## Long Rest

Long rests refresh more resources.

## GM Consequences

The GM gains Fear after a party rest.
